caption: A man with light-colored, stylized hair, glasses, and headphones sits in a studio setting. He is wearing a white button-down shirt, a red bow tie, and tan suspenders. In front of him is a black professional microphone. The background consists of a wall decorated with several small, framed photographs and other decor, including a mannequin. A logo appearing in each frame features a microphone icon and the text "TALK JOI PODCAST" on the left and "TALK JOI" on the right. As the sequence progresses, the man remains in a seated position, shifting his facial expression slightly and opening his mouth as if speaking, while his gaze remains directed toward someone off-camera. The camera angle remains static, capturing him from the chest up throughout the scene.
